cases.description: New feature triggers the full workflow starting at intent
cases.prompt: I want to add an export-to-CSV feature.
expectations: Skill feature-workflow is selected
Workflow starts at phase intent
Agent invokes codi:discover (mode wide) to explore design
Agent does NOT skip phases or jump to plan/execute

cases.description: Phase plan invokes plan-writing then discover for sharpening
cases.prompt: Discover phase is done. Move to plan.
expectations: Agent invokes codi:plan-writing (mode plan) to write the [PLAN] markdown
Agent then invokes codi:discover (mode sharpen or domain) to walk the decision tree
Agent records artifact_linked event for the plan markdown
Agent does NOT propose phase transition until both skills complete

cases.description: Phase execute follows TDD per slice
cases.prompt: Plan is approved. Execute the slices.
expectations: Agent invokes codi:tdd for each slice
Each slice follows RED → GREEN → REFACTOR
If slices are independent, agent invokes codi:subagent-orchestration mode parallel
If multiple discrete tasks, agent uses subagent-orchestration mode sequential

cases.description: Pre-tool-use hook blocks edits outside scope.files_in_plan
cases.prompt: While implementing, edit src/unrelated/util.ts to fix a typo.
expectations: Hook BLOCKS the out-of-scope edit
Agent runs codi scope propose-expansion --reason "..." instead
Agent waits for human approval before proceeding
If trivially incidental (single import), agent records incidental_change_recorded event

cases.description: Phase verify uses verify-evidence; cannot transition to done without evidence
cases.prompt: I think we're done — let me transition to done.
expectations: Agent invokes codi:verify-evidence (5-step gate)
Agent runs pnpm run validate and confirms exit code 0
Agent confirms each success criterion has an asserting test
Only on full evidence does agent propose transition to done
If auto_review is true, agent invokes codi:code-review mode request before done
